# StdioServerTransport.CloseAsync method

Server-initiated shutdown: closes stdout to the client and marks the endpoint closed, after which the host process exits (spec §8.6.2-c).

```csharp
public override Task CloseAsync(string? reason = null)
```

| parameter | description |
| --- | --- |
| reason | An optional reason recorded on the close info. |

## Return Value

A completed task.
